calibrations.description: Volume measured for various solenoid opening times

parameters.output_arguments: -vf "scale=out_color_matrix=bt709:out_range=full,format=bgr24,scale=out_range=full" -c:v h264_nvenc -pix_fmt yuv420p -color_range full -colorspace bt709 -color_trc linear -tune hq -preset p4 -rc vbr -cq 12 -b:v 0M -metadata author="Allen Institute for Neural Dynamics" -maxrate 700M -bufsize 350M

-vf "scale=out_color_matrix=bt709:out_range=full,format=bgr24,scale=out_range=full" -c:v h264_nvenc -pix_fmt yuv420p -color_range full -colorspace bt709 -color_trc linear -tune hq -preset p4 -rc vbr -cq 12 -b:v 0M -metadata author="Allen Institute for Neural Dynamics" -maxrate 700M -bufsize 350M

-vf "scale=out_color_matrix=bt709:out_range=full,format=bgr24,scale=out_range=full" -c:v h264_nvenc -pix_fmt yuv420p -color_range full -colorspace bt709 -color_trc linear -tune hq -preset p4 -rc vbr -cq 12 -b:v 0M -metadata author="Allen Institute for Neural Dynamics" -maxrate 700M -bufsize 350M

components.name: Patch Cord 0
components.notes: All four patch cords are actually a single device at the camera end with four separate connections to connect to up to four implanted fibers. Unused patch cables are not physically connected to an implanted fiber during an experiment.

components.name: Patch Cord 1
components.notes: All four patch cords are actually a single device at the camera end with four separate connections to connect to up to four implanted fibers. Unused patch cables are not physically connected to an implanted fiber during an experiment.

components.name: screen_hot_mirror
components.notes: Dichroic filter to reflect visible light and pass infrared light; used to combine IR illumination with visible stimulus on the same screen.

lick_spouts.name: lick_spout
lick_spouts.notes: Lick spout for water delivery, the tube is ordered from McMaster, cut to size and shaped by AIND

motorized_stage.name: motorized_stage
motorized_stage.notes: This stage is driven by the manipulator device.

metrics.name: ContractTestSuite::test_has_errors_on_load
metrics.description:
Test: Check if any non-excluded data streams had loading errors. // Message: The following DataStreams raised errors on load: 
 fip::raw_green
fip::raw_red
fip::raw_iso
fip::background_raw_green
fip::background_raw_red
fip::background_raw_iso
fip::background_green
fip::background_red
fip::background_iso

metrics.name: ContractTestSuite::test_has_excluded_as_warnings
metrics.description: Test: Check if any excluded data streams had loading errors and report as warnings. // Message: No excluded DataStreams raised errors on load

metrics.name: Baseline correction of ROI 0 using method 'bright'
metrics.description: Baseline $$F_0(t)$$ fit with  $$b_{inf} \cdot (1 + b_{slow}\exp(-t/t_{slow}) + b_{fast}\exp(-t/t_{fast}) + b_{rapid}\exp(-t/t_{rapid})) \cdot (1 - b_{bright}\exp(-t/t_{bright}))$$

metrics.name: Motion correction of ROI 0 using method 'bright'
metrics.description: Maximum regression coefficient
